testcases.input: nums = [10,4,8,3] Output: [15,1,11,22] Explanation: The array leftSum is [0,10,14,22] and the array rightSum is [15,11,3,0]. The array answer is [|0 - 15|,|10 - 11|,|14 - 3|,|22 - 0|] = [15,1,11,22].
testcases.expectedOutput: [15,1,11,22] Explanation: The array leftSum is [0,10,14,22] and the array rightSum is [15,11,3,0]. The array answer is [|0 - 15|,|10 - 11|,|14 - 3|,|22 - 0|] = [15,1,11,22].
